## Checklist

- [ ] My files are under `submissions/` and each filename starts with my exact GitHub username followed by `_`.
- [ ] I included the unmodified initial output (`v1`) and my refined solution (`v2`).
- [ ] My refined solution runs and produces labelled plots.
- [ ] I have acknowledged any external code or resources I used.
- [ ] I have not included student numbers, marks, private contact details, credentials, or other sensitive information.
- [ ] I understand that this repository and Pull Request are public, and I consent to publishing the material submitted here.
